narrative:
York Township (precinct in Athens County) has 1,087 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.0 percentage points.
